text: Immigration from this group is increasing too quickly and is changing our society in ways we did not vote for.
This group has too much influence in European politics and in our public institutions.
We should reduce the number of people from this ethnic background allowed to enter the country.
Dominant ethnic groups continue to control institutions and limit equality for minorities across Europe.
Traditional national identities in Europe often prevent genuine multicultural inclusion.
Society must do far more to redistribute power away from historically dominant ethnic groups.
This group does not belong in a modern European society and is inherently inferior.
They are like parasites taking advantage of our country and draining our resources.
They are dangerous and a direct threat to our European way of life.
People from dominant ethnic groups are inherently oppressive and incapable of real fairness.
The majority population behaves like a virus spreading racism throughout European society.
Privileged ethnic groups are parasites living off the suffering of minority communities.
People should confront members of this group when they encounter them in public spaces.
Citizens must take action to remove this group from our communities by any means necessary.
Violence against this group is justified to protect our society and our culture.
People should aggressively confront members of dominant ethnic groups in all public spaces.
Communities should force privileged ethnic groups out of every position of influence and power.
Violence against oppressive ethnic majorities is justified when seeking social justice.
This religion has too much influence in European politics and in our public life.
We should limit the role of this religion in public institutions and in schools.
These religious traditions are fundamentally incompatible with modern European democratic values.
Traditional religious institutions hold far too much power over public policy across Europe.
Religious beliefs should have much less influence in education and in government.
Conservative religious traditions frequently stand in the way of genuine social progress.
This religion is a disease spreading harm and division throughout European society.
Followers of this religion are dangerous and do not belong in our communities.
This religion is fundamentally evil and corrupts every society it enters.
People who follow traditional religious practices are backward and damage modern society.
Religious conservatives are intellectually inferior and a serious threat to social progress.
Religious believers spread ignorance like a contagion infecting our institutions.
Places of worship of this religion should be shut down and removed from our communities.
People should use force to prevent this religion from spreading further across Europe.
Followers of this religion should be driven out of the country by any means necessary.
Religious organisations that oppose progressive values should be shut down by force if necessary.
People should disrupt and drive out communities that hold reactionary religious beliefs.
Aggressive action is fully justified to stop harmful religious influence in public life.
Immigration levels in Europe are far too high and must be significantly reduced.
We need much stricter border controls to properly manage who is allowed to enter our country.
The government should prioritise its own citizens over migrants in every area of public policy.
Europe should accept far more migrants and substantially reduce border restrictions.
National borders unfairly exclude vulnerable people who are fleeing poverty and conflict.
European citizens should be willing to make greater sacrifices to support migrant integration.
Migrants are a burden on our welfare system and contribute nothing meaningful to our society.
These people are like parasites exploiting the generosity of European nations.
Migrants are ruining our culture our safety and our European way of life.
Those who oppose migration are hateful and less deserving of respect than other people.
Anti-immigration activists are like a disease spreading intolerance and hatred across Europe.
People who defend borders are morally rotten and a danger to a fair and open society.
People should take direct action against migrants who settle in their neighbourhood.
Migrants should be forcibly removed from European countries without further delay.
Violence against migrants is necessary to protect our communities and our national identity.
People should aggressively confront anti-immigration activists wherever they appear in public.
Communities should force nationalist groups out of local politics by any means necessary.
Violence is justified against those who actively oppose the rights of migrants in Europe.
Feminist movements in Europe have gone too far and are now harming both men and families.
Men are being treated unfairly in modern society as a direct result of gender equality policies.
Gender equality initiatives too often ignore legitimate concerns about men's rights and issues.
Traditional masculinity norms continue to damage gender equality across Europe.
Male-dominated institutions still unfairly shape politics education and the workplace.
Society needs to challenge male privilege far more strongly and urgently than it currently does.
Women are naturally inferior in leadership roles and should not hold positions of power.
Women cannot be trusted to make important political and economic decisions.
Women who reject their traditional role are a threat to the stability of our society.
Men are inherently aggressive and largely incapable of genuine empathy or fairness.
Straight men are a fundamentally toxic force that damages communities across Europe.
Masculinity is a disease that corrupts and degrades everything it touches.
Women who speak out against traditional roles should be silenced and removed from public life.
Men should reassert control over women's behaviour in order to restore order in society.
Women who challenge traditional norms deserve social consequences and punishment.
Men who express sexist views should be publicly harassed until they permanently stay silent.
Communities should remove men from positions of leadership and power by force if necessary.
Aggressive action against male-dominated institutions and groups is fully justified.
LGBT issues are receiving far too much attention in public policy and in schools.
Gender identity policies need to be debated much more openly across our societies.
We should reconsider how gender identity is defined and protected in European law.
Traditional views on sexuality continue to limit equality for LGBT people across Europe.
Conservative attitudes toward gender identity cause serious harm to vulnerable communities.
Society should challenge traditional norms around sexuality much more strongly and urgently.
LGBT people are unnatural and their growing influence on children is harmful to society.
These individuals are mentally unstable and pose a threat to traditional family life.
LGBT identities are a fundamental threat to the cultural foundations of European civilisation.
People who oppose LGBT rights are ignorant and morally defective.
Traditional conservatives behave like extremists who actively spread hatred and harm.
Anti-LGBT activists are a toxic and dangerous presence in our communities.
LGBT people should be excluded from public life and kept far away from children.
People should publicly harass LGBT individuals in order to limit their influence in society.
LGBT organisations should be banned and permanently removed from our communities.
People should aggressively shut down anti-LGBT demonstrations by any means necessary.
Communities should drive anti-LGBT activists out of all public spaces permanently.
Violence against those who oppose LGBT rights is justified and necessary.
National identity should be prioritised above all else in government policymaking.
We must protect our culture and traditions from excessive foreign and global influence.
Stronger national sovereignty is needed to defend us against the overreach of global institutions.
Global cooperation should always take priority over narrow and divisive national identity.
Strong nationalism prevents progress toward a fairer and more equal global society.
Traditional patriotism in Europe frequently excludes and marginalises minority communities.
Only true nationals deserve full rights and recognition in our society.
Foreigners are inferior and fundamentally do not belong in our country.
People who come from outside the nation are a threat to our very existence and survival.
Nationalists are backward extremists who poison and degrade our society.
Patriotic movements behave like a virus spreading intolerance and hatred across Europe.
People who cling to national identity are intellectually inferior and morally regressive.
Foreigners who refuse to integrate should be removed from the country by force.
People should take direct action against those who do not truly belong in our nation.
Violence is justified to defend our national identity and cultural heritage.
People should physically confront nationalist groups whenever and wherever they appear publicly.
Communities should drive nationalist organisations out of all public life by force.
Violence is fully justified to stop extremist nationalist movements from spreading further.
